{"personas": [
    {
        "name": "Frontend Fiona",
        "demographics": "28, Frontend Developer, 3-5 years experience, proficient in modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue, Angular).",
        "goals": [
            "Quickly integrate the todo API into a web application.",
            "Build a smooth and responsive user experience for todo management.",
            "Implement secure user authentication and authorization.",
            "Handle various API responses and errors gracefully."
        ],
        "pain_points": [
            "Poor or outdated API documentation.",
            "Inconsistent API endpoint naming or data structures.",
            "Complex or unclear authentication flows (JWT handling).",
            "Vague or unhelpful error messages from the API.",
            "Slow API response times impacting UI performance.",
            "Lack of clear examples for API usage."
        ],
        "scenarios": [
            "Fiona needs to register a new user for the todo app.",
            "Fiona needs to log in an existing user and store their JWT securely.",
            "Fiona needs to fetch all todo items for the authenticated user.",
            "Fiona needs to create a new todo item with a title and description.",
            "Fiona needs to mark a specific todo item as complete or incomplete.",
            "Fiona needs to delete a todo item.",
            "Fiona needs to handle an expired JWT token and prompt for re-authentication."
        ]
    },
    {
        "name": "Mobile Mike",
        "demographics": "32, Mobile App Developer, 5+ years experience, works with iOS (Swift) or Android (Kotlin/Java).",
        "goals": [
            "Integrate the todo API into a native mobile application.",
            "Ensure the app works reliably offline (if applicable, by caching API data).",
            "Optimize API calls for mobile network conditions (latency, data usage).",
            "Provide a seamless and secure mobile user experience."
        ],
        "pain_points": [
            "Large API response payloads consuming mobile data.",
            "Lack of clear guidance on handling JWTs in mobile environments.",
            "Inconsistent API behavior across different network conditions.",
            "Difficulty debugging API issues without clear server-side logging.",
            "API not supporting efficient data synchronization patterns."
        ],
        "scenarios": [
            "Mike needs to implement user registration and login for the mobile app.",
            "Mike needs to display a list of todos, potentially with pagination.",
            "Mike needs to allow users to quickly add new todos on the go.",
            "Mike needs to handle network interruptions gracefully when making API calls.",
            "Mike needs to ensure secure storage and usage of JWT tokens on the device."
        ]
    }
],
"user_journeys": [
    {
        "persona": "Frontend Fiona",
        "steps": [
            {
                "action": "Discover API documentation for user authentication.",
                "touchpoint": "Project README, Swagger/OpenAPI UI",
                "emotion": "Hopeful, Curious",
                "opportunity": "Provide a clear 'Getting Started' guide for authentication, including example requests/responses."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement user registration API call.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/register`)",
                "emotion": "Focused, Challenged",
                "opportunity": "Ensure request body schema is clear and validation errors are specific and actionable."
            },
            {
                "action": "Test registration with valid and invalid data.",
                "touchpoint": "Browser Dev Tools, Postman/Insomnia, API Endpoint",
                "emotion": "Satisfied (if successful), Frustrated (if errors are vague)",
                "opportunity": "Return distinct HTTP status codes and detailed error messages for validation failures (e.g., 'Email already exists', 'Password too short')."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement user login API call and store JWT.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/login`)",
                "emotion": "Confident (if registration was smooth)",
                "opportunity": "Clearly document the JWT structure, expiration, and recommended storage/usage practices (though backend-only, this impacts frontend design)."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement authenticated API call (e.g., fetch todos).",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/todos`)",
                "emotion": "Successful",
                "opportunity": "Provide clear examples of how to include the JWT in the Authorization header for subsequent requests."
            },
            {
                "action": "Handle JWT expiration and refresh (if applicable).",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint",
                "emotion": "Annoyed (if not well-documented), Empowered (if clear strategy provided)",
                "opportunity": "Document the expected behavior upon JWT expiration (e.g., 401 Unauthorized) and any token refresh mechanism."
            }
        ]
    },
    {
        "persona": "Frontend Fiona",
        "steps": [
            {
                "action": "Review API documentation for todo management endpoints.",
                "touchpoint": "Swagger/OpenAPI UI",
                "emotion": "Anticipatory",
                "opportunity": "Ensure all CRUD operations for todos are clearly defined with examples."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement fetching all todos for the current user.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/todos`)",
                "emotion": "Productive",
                "opportunity": "Consider pagination or filtering options for large lists of todos."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement creating a new todo item.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/todos`)",
                "emotion": "Engaged",
                "opportunity": "Provide clear validation rules for todo fields (e.g., title not empty)."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement marking a todo as complete/incomplete.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/todos/{id}`) (PATCH/PUT)",
                "emotion": "Efficient",
                "opportunity": "Ensure idempotent updates and clear success responses."
            },
            {
                "action": "Implement deleting a todo item.",
                "touchpoint": "Code Editor, API Endpoint (`/todos/{id}`) (DELETE)",
